description_long: This office building features a modern, boxy structure with extensive floor-to-ceiling glass windows framed in dark metal, creating a grid-like facade on three sides. The building is predominantly white with clean, sharp lines and minimal ornamentation, emphasizing transparency and openness. The upper floor appears to have an open-plan layout, visible through the large glass panels, while the lower floor is similarly transparent, suggesting a spacious interior. The roof is flat and partially open, with some visible mechanical or utility structures. There is no visible signage or decorative elements, reinforcing the minimalist, functional design. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for a corporate or creative office environment in an urban setting.
description: A modern, two-story office building with large grid-patterned glass windows and a minimalist white exterior, featuring a flat roof and open, transparent facades.
description_view_0: This view highlights the building's prominent glass facade with a regular grid pattern, revealing the open-plan interior and upper floor details.
description_view_1: This side shows a mostly solid white wall with a single vertical strip of windows, contrasting with the glass-heavy facades on other sides.
description_view_2: This angle displays another solid white wall with a vertical window section and a glimpse of the building's roof structures.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the opposite glass facade, mirroring the grid pattern and transparency seen in view 0, with some interior furnishings visible.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular, floor-to-ceiling rectangular grid pattern with evenly spaced mullions on multiple facades.
